summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of banbansports UNDERGROUND HD with 3 new features: notification system, clean REKLAM video without yellow overlay, and Play Store redirect on video end. All features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Notification toggle button exists with correct 'BİLDİRİM KAPALI' text
Notification system functions implemented (toggleNotifications, sendNotification, sendMatchNotification)
REKLAM video plays clean gameplay footage WITHOUT yellow 'PUBG MOBILE' text overlay
REKLAM video has loop=false (confirmed not looping)
REKLAM video onended handler successfully redirects to Play Store PUBG Mobile
REKLAM-PUBG MOBILE badge correctly shows as overlay element
Scoreboard displays real match data (Konyaspor vs Fatih Karagümrük)
Match Center loads with 20+ match cards (23 found)
All previous functionality preserved (BACKEND_URL dynamic, LiveScore API)
Video duration 20 seconds, clean PUBG Mobile Battle Royale gameplay
Browser notification support detected and permission handling implemented
